title: LinkedIn Message Sync - Output Schema
description: The schema for the data outputted by the actor. It contains a summary and a list of conversations.

status.title: Sync Status
status.description: The overall status of the sync operation (e.g., 'SUCCESS', 'FAILED').

account_owner.title: Account Owner URL
account_owner.description: The LinkedIn profile URL of the account owner whose messages were synced.

sync_at.title: Sync Timestamp
sync_at.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the sync was completed.

conversations_count.title: Total Conversations
conversations_count.description: The total number of conversations found and synced.

data.title: Conversations List
data.description: An array containing the details of each conversation.

threadId.title: Thread ID
threadId.description: The unique identifier for the conversation thread.

participant_name.title: Participant Name
participant_name.description: The name of the other participant in the conversation.

last_message_text.title: Last Message Text
last_message_text.description: The content of the last message in the conversation.

last_message_at.title: Last Message Timestamp
last_message_at.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp of the last message.

is_reply.title: Is a Reply
is_reply.description: True if the last message was sent by the other participant.

unread_count.title: Unread Count
unread_count.description: The number of unread messages in the conversation.

is_read.title: Is Read
is_read.description: True if the conversation is marked as read.

conversation_url.title: Conversation URL
conversation_url.description: A direct URL to the conversation on LinkedIn.
